task.summary: CLI Tool: parse() returns bool instead of exit code
task.description: Change parse() return type from bool to error in cmd/commands/parse.go.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "edit_description": "Change parse() return type from bool to error in cmd/commands/parse.go",
  "target_files": ["cmd/commands/parse.go"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i 's/return bool/return error/' cmd/commands/parse.go",
    "sed -i 's/return error/return bool/' cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'return' cmd/commands/parse.go",
    "grep -q 'return error' cmd/commands/parse.go"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "parse() function now returns error type instead of bool",
  "risk_notes": "Potential type mismatch if caller expects bool",
  "follow_up_type": "needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Change parse() return type from bool to error in cmd/commands/parse.go
parsed.expected_outcome: parse() function now returns error type instead of bool
parsed.risk_notes: Potential type mismatch if caller expects bool
